summary: Iteration 44: Testing TemaDom 3D Designer v7 overhaul. All features PASS: New logo loads at /temadom-logo.png, photo-based 3D Designer with 3 upload slots, package selection (69/129/199 EUR), dimension inputs, style/room selects, photo guide toggle, generate button disabled without photos, backend endpoints exist and work correctly.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (14/14 passed) ===
✅ GET /api/ - API root accessible
✅ GET /api/categories - Returns 15 categories
✅ GET /api/stats/live - Returns free_slots.total = 56
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate - Endpoint exists (returns 422 without files)
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate - Requires at least one photo file
✅ GET /api/ai-designer/my-projects - Requires authentication (401)
✅ GET /api/ai-designer/project/{id} - Returns 404 for invalid ID
✅ POST /api/auth/register - Validates company bulstat (required for companies)
✅ POST /api/auth/register - Validates bulstat format (must be 9 digits)
✅ POST /api/auth/register - Client registration works
✅ POST /api/auth/login - Login works after registration
✅ GET /api/ai-designer/my-projects - Returns projects array for authenticated user
✅ GET /temadom-logo.png - Logo file accessible
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/project/{id}/share - Requires authentication
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
✅ Landing page: New logo visible in navbar (temadom-logo.png)
✅ Landing page: Hero counter shows '15 / 56' with 'ПЪРВИ 56 ФИРМИ = 1 ГОДИНА ПРЕМИУМ 0 EUR'
✅ Landing page: Live counter widget shows '40 FREE 16/56'
✅ Landing page: '3D Video Designer' button works
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Auth gate shows for non-authenticated users
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): TEMADOM 3D DESIGNER v7.0 header with badge
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Subtitle '3 снимки → РЕАЛИСТИЧЕН 360° дизайн + бюджет с директни линкове'
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): 'Моите проекти' (My Projects) button visible for authenticated users
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Photo guide 'КАК ДА СНИМАШ ПРАВИЛНО' toggle works
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Photo guide shows 3 instructions (Фронтална, Лява СТЕНА, Дясна СТЕНА)
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): 3 photo upload slots (Фронтална*, Лява, Дясна)
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Package selection: 69 EUR (1 помещение), 129 EUR (2 помещения), 199 EUR (Апартамент)
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Dimension inputs: width=4, length=5, height=2.7
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Room type select (Хол selected by default)
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Style select (Модерен selected by default)
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Notes textarea visible
✅ 3D Designer (/room-scan): Generate button disabled without photos
critical_code_review_comments: AIDesignerPage.jsx completely rewritten for v7 with photo-based workflow:
- 3 photo slots (Фронтална, Лява, Дясна) instead of video upload
- Photo guide toggle with expandable instructions
- My Projects feature for authenticated users
- Share functionality (Facebook, Twitter, link copy) in SharePanel component
- Budget tier cards (Economy/Medium/Premium) with BudgetTierCard component
- Direct product links with ProductLink component
- POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate (line 2503) - accepts multipart form with photos
- Registration enforces limit with error message (line 145-148)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tested TemaDom 3D Designer v7 features. Key data-testids: temadom-logo, hero-counter, live-counter, auth-gate-modal, ia-designer-page, guide-toggle, guide-content, photo-upload-grid, photo-drop-0/1/2, pkg-1/2/3, dim-width/length/height, room-type, style-select, generate-btn, my-projects-btn, share-btn, budget-tiers. Backend endpoints tested: /api/ai-designer/photo-generate, /api/ai-designer/my-projects, /api/ai-designer/project/{id}. Regional limit enforced at registration for companies (2 per region = 56 total).

photo_based_3d_designer.details: 3 photo upload slots (Фронтална, Лява, Дясна) instead of video

package_selection.details: 3 packages: 69 EUR (1 room), 129 EUR (2 rooms), 199 EUR (apartment)

dimension_inputs.details: Width, Length, Height inputs with default values

style_and_room_selects.details: Room type and style dropdowns work

generate_button_disabled.details: Button disabled without photos, as expected

photo_guide_toggle.details: Toggle expands to show photography instructions

auth_gate.details: Non-authenticated users see auth gate on /room-scan

regional_firm_limit.details: Company registration validates bulstat and regional limit
